title: vSmartMOM parameter file
description: Schema for vSmartMOM scene/configuration files consumed by parameters_from_file and parameters_from_dict. TOML keys containing Unicode, such as "Δ_angle", must be quoted in TOML. See docs/dev_notes/pre_registration_hardening_plan.md and src/IO/Parameters.jl for parser details.

_metadata.description: Optional provenance metadata. Ignored by the vSmartMOM parameter parser.

radiative_transfer.description: RT solver configuration. v0.7 makes nstreams the primary user knob; max_m / l_trunc / quadrature_type are now optional with backward-compatible defaults. See docs/src/pages/IO/Schema/radiative_transfer.md for the full reference.

spec_bands.description: Spectral band expressions parsed by _safe_parse_spec_band, for example "[13000.0, 13000.1]" or "(1e7/775):0.05:(1e7/755)".

surface.description: One surface expression per band. Parser supports LambertianSurfaceScalar, LambertianSurfaceSpectrum, LambertianSurfaceLegendre, rpvSurfaceScalar, RossLiSurfaceScalar, and CoxMunkSurface.

quadrature_type.description: Optional angular quadrature rule. Leave unset for the default Gauss-Legendre quadrature.
enumDescriptions: Default. Gauss-Legendre streams; generally cheaper and more accurate per stream for Rayleigh-only setups.
Legacy-compatible Radau streams. Use when reproducing older setups that were tuned against Radau quadrature.
YAML only. Same as omitting the field: use GaussLegQuad(). TOML has no null value, so omit the key.

polarization_type.description: Stokes vector dimensionality. Choose the smallest state that carries the signal you need.
enumDescriptions: Scalar intensity only. Fastest option; suitable for scalar surfaces and unpolarized diagnostics.
Intensity plus linear Q polarization. Useful when U/V are known to be unnecessary.
Intensity plus both linear polarization components. Good default for polarized reflection without circular polarization.
Full Stokes vector including circular polarization V. Most complete and most expensive option.

nstreams.description: v0.7 primary resolution knob: weighted streams per hemisphere. Public contract: stream_l_cap = 2·nstreams - 1 regardless of quadrature_type. Minimum 3 (Rayleigh declares Fourier support through m=2). Default 8 when no legacy fields are set (gives stream_l_cap = 15; matches typical aerosol δ-fit caps and four-decimal-place Rayleigh convergence).

m_max.description: v0.7 explicit Fourier loop bound (order). Optional override clamping the trait-derived bound from above. Default null.

max_m.description: Legacy: Fourier moment count (loop runs m=0:max_m-1). Triggers legacy-schema parsing. Use nstreams in new configs.

Δ_angle.description: Optional forward-peak exclusion angle in degrees consumed by δBGE truncation. Defaults to 0.0 (no forward-peak excluded) when omitted; legacy YAMLs may still set 2.0 explicitly. In TOML, quote the Unicode key as "Δ_angle" = 0.0.

l_trunc.description: Legacy Legendre truncation length. Plays the role of stream_l_cap under the legacy schema. Use nstreams instead in new configs.

truncation.description: v0.7 phase-function truncation mode. 'auto' (default): VLIDORT-DO_DELTAM_SCALING-style. NoTruncation if no aerosols; δBGE(stream_l_cap, Δ_angle) once aerosols are configured — the per-band Mie loop applies δBGE only when greek.β exceeds the cap, otherwise falls back to NoTruncation. 'NoTruncation()' / null: exactly no transform; coefficients above the cap are silently dropped. 'δBGE(L, Δ)': explicit forward-peak handling (Sanghavi & Stephens 2015) — set explicitly to override the auto resolver.

oneOf.description: Recommended default. NoTruncation if no aerosols; δBGE(stream_l_cap, Δ_angle) once aerosols are configured (with a per-band length guard that falls back to NoTruncation when the raw greek series already fits the cap).
Do not transform the phase function. Appropriate for Rayleigh-only or other phase series that already fit the stream cap.
Explicit delta-BGE forward-peak handling, for example δBGE(20, 2.0). Use for benchmark reproduction or known strongly forward-scattering aerosol cases.
YAML only. Same as NoTruncation(). TOML has no null value, so use NoTruncation() or omit the key depending on intent.

float_type.description: Floating point type used by the RT model.
enumDescriptions: Default precision for science runs and cross-validation.
Lower-memory, faster path for GPU or throughput-oriented experiments after accuracy is checked.
Use the package default backend for the current environment. Best for portable examples.
Force the CPU backend. Best for CI, debugging, and reproducible small runs.
Force the CPU backend. Best for CI, debugging, and reproducible small runs.
Use the CUDA backend when CUDA is installed and available.
Use the CUDA backend when CUDA is installed and available.
Use the Metal backend on supported Apple hardware.
Use the Metal backend on supported Apple hardware.

blas_threads.description: Per-model BLAS thread cap. null = leave global BLAS alone (default). Recommend 4-8 for batched runs.

obs_alt.description: Observer altitude/pressure coordinate used by the existing parser.

profile_reduction.description: Profile reduction level. TOML has no null value, so omit future optional semantics carefully or use an integer.

vmr.description: Volume mixing ratios by molecule name.

enumDescriptions: Default physical line shape combining Doppler and pressure broadening.
Thermal Doppler broadening only. Useful in low-pressure or diagnostic setups.
Pressure broadening only. Useful for simplified high-pressure diagnostics.

CEF.description: Complex error function implementation used by Voigt absorption.
enumDescriptions: Current supported implementation; stable default for Voigt line-shape evaluation.

λ_ref.description: Reference wavelength. In TOML, write this key as "λ_ref" = 550.0.

decomp_type.description: Aerosol phase-matrix decomposition used to produce Greek coefficients.
enumDescriptions: Normalized associated integral decomposition. Current default path for aerosol Greek coefficients.
Polynomials of generalized spherical functions. Use for comparisons with PCW-based references.

canopy.description: Optional canopy wrapper configuration parsed by _parse_canopy_section.

docs.main: vSmartMOM parameter file schema. Source of truth is `src/IO/Parameters.jl`; this schema mirrors the public file format for editor help and Taplo validation.
